bitdos-1.2 nur.repos.bandithedoge.bitdos A bit-inverting industrial distortion plugin with VST3/LV2
blender-radeon-prorender-3.6.11 nur.repos.bandithedoge.blender-radeon-prorender This hardware-agnostic rendering plug-in for Blender uses accurate ray-tracing technology to produce images and animations of your scenes, and provides real-time interactive rendering and continuous adjustment of effects
crunchrr-release-91 nur.repos.bandithedoge.blepfx.crunchrr crunchrr is a really simple to use effect that adds digital artifacts to your sounds. It works by modulating a small fractional delay line at an audio rate at high frequency, resulting in a bit crush/sample divide/erosion kind of effect
destruqtor-release-91 nur.repos.bandithedoge.blepfx.destruqtor destruqtor is a companding distortion/saturation/exciter plugin. Unlike traditional distortion, destruqtor applies expanding compression before the waveshaper and an opposite compression after the effect, which preserves and emphasises transients and adds more warmth to your sounds without sacrificing dynamic range
filtrr-release-91 nur.repos.bandithedoge.blepfx.filtrr filtrr is not just a filter! filtrr is a nonlinear ladder filter that is capable of producing a large variety of sounds
prisma-release-91 nur.repos.bandithedoge.blepfx.prisma prisma is an FFT based 3-in-1 plugin. It's a pitch shifter that works even on polyphonic audio sources, a formant shifter, and a pitch quantizer (useful for achieving that iconic color bass sound)
blocks-2024-08-07 nur.repos.bandithedoge.blocks User friendly cross platform modular synth
cantata-3.3.1 nur.repos.bandithedoge.cantata Graphical client for MPD

crepe-vamp-plugin-bin-3.0.0 nur.repos.bandithedoge.crepe-vamp-plugin-bin The Crepe plugin is an implementation of the CREPE monophonic pitch tracker, based on a deep convolutional neural network operating directly on the time-domain waveform input, as a Vamp plugin

gitako-3.12.1 nur.repos.bandithedoge.firefoxAddons.gitako Gitako is a file tree extension for GitHub, available on Firefox, Chrome, and Edge.

Video intro: https://youtu.be/r4Ein-s2pN0
Homepage: https://github.com/EnixCoda/Gitako
github-code-folding-0.1.2resigned1 nur.repos.bandithedoge.firefoxAddons.github-code-folding Enable code folding when viewing files in GitHub.
github-isometric-contributions-1.1.31 nur.repos.bandithedoge.firefoxAddons.github-isometric-contributions Renders an isometric pixel view of GitHub contribution graphs.
github-repo-size-1.7.0 nur.repos.bandithedoge.firefoxAddons.github-repo-size Add repositories size to their GitHub summary band using the GitHub public API.
imagus-0.9.8.74 nur.repos.bandithedoge.firefoxAddons.imagus With a simple mouse-over you can enlarge images and display images/videos from links.
indie-wiki-buddy-3.13.6 nur.repos.bandithedoge.firefoxAddons.indie-wiki-buddy Helping you discover quality, independent wikis!

When visiting a Fandom wiki, Indie Wiki Buddy redirects or alerts you of independent alternatives. It also filters search engine results. BreezeWiki is also supported, to reduce clutter on Fandom.
lovely-forks-3.7.3 nur.repos.bandithedoge.firefoxAddons.lovely-forks Show notable forks of Github projects.
material-icons-for-github-1.10.5 nur.repos.bandithedoge.firefoxAddons.material-icons-for-github Replace the file/folder icons on github file browsers with icons representing the file's type and which tool it is used by.
nexusmods-advance-0.24.0.1 nur.repos.bandithedoge.firefoxAddons.nexusmods-advance Enhance your browsing experience on the NexusMods site and manage your mods directly through the browser!
npm-hub-2024.7.26 nur.repos.bandithedoge.firefoxAddons.npm-hub Explore npm dependencies on GitHub repos
octolinker-6.10.5 nur.repos.bandithedoge.firefoxAddons.octolinker It turns language-specific module-loading statements like include, require or import into links. Depending on the language it will either redirect you to the referenced file or to an external website like a manual page or another service.
privacy-badger-2025.9.2 nur.repos.bandithedoge.firefoxAddons.privacy-badger Automatically learns to block hidden trackers. Made by the leading digital rights nonprofit EFF to stop companies from spying on you.
privacy-pass-4.0.2 nur.repos.bandithedoge.firefoxAddons.privacy-pass Client support for Privacy Pass anonymous authorization protocol.
pronoundb-0.14.6 nur.repos.bandithedoge.firefoxAddons.pronoundb PronounDB is a browser extension that helps people know each other's pronouns easily and instantly. Whether hanging out on a Twitch chat, or on any of the supported platforms, PronounDB will make your life easier.
reddit-enhancement-suite-5.24.8 nur.repos.bandithedoge.firefoxAddons.reddit-enhancement-suite Reddit Enhancement Suite (RES) is a suite of tools to enhance your Reddit browsing experience.
refined-github-25.8.27 nur.repos.bandithedoge.firefoxAddons.refined-github Simplifies the GitHub interface and adds many useful features.
search_by_image-8.2.4 nur.repos.bandithedoge.firefoxAddons.search_by_image A powerful reverse image search tool, with support for various search engines, such as Google, Bing, Yandex, Baidu and TinEye.
sidebery-5.3.3 nur.repos.bandithedoge.firefoxAddons.sidebery Vertical tabs tree and bookmarks in sidebar with advanced containers configuration, grouping and many other features.
skip-redirect-2.3.6 nur.repos.bandithedoge.firefoxAddons.skip-redirect Some web pages use intermediary pages before redirecting to a final page. This add-on tries to extract the final url from the intermediary url and goes there straight away if successful.
sourcegraph-23.4.14.1343 nur.repos.bandithedoge.firefoxAddons.sourcegraph Adds code intelligence to GitHub, GitLab, Bitbucket Server, and Phabricator: hovers, definitions, references. Supports 20+ languages.
sponsorblock-5.14 nur.repos.bandithedoge.firefoxAddons.sponsorblock Easily skip YouTube video sponsors. When you visit a YouTube video, the extension will check the database for reported sponsors and automatically skip known sponsors. You can also report sponsors in videos. Other browsers: https://sponsor.ajay.app
steam-database-4.26 nur.repos.bandithedoge.firefoxAddons.steam-database Adds SteamDB links and new features on the Steam store and community. View lowest game prices and stats.
stylus-2.3.16 nur.repos.bandithedoge.firefoxAddons.stylus Redesign your favorite websites with Stylus, an actively developed and community driven userstyles manager. Easily install custom themes from popular online repositories, or create, edit, and manage your own personalized CSS stylesheets.
tabcenter-reborn-3.0.1 nur.repos.bandithedoge.firefoxAddons.tabcenter-reborn Simple and powerful vertical tab bar
tree-style-tab-4.2.5 nur.repos.bandithedoge.firefoxAddons.tree-style-tab Show tabs like a tree.
tridactyl-1.24.4 nur.repos.bandithedoge.firefoxAddons.tridactyl Vim, but in your browser. Replace Firefox's control mechanism with one modelled on Vim.

This addon is very usable, but is in an early stage of development. We intend to implement the majority of Vimperator's features.
ublock-origin-1.66.4 nur.repos.bandithedoge.firefoxAddons.ublock-origin Finally, an efficient wide-spectrum content blocker. Easy on CPU and memory.
violentmonkey-2.31.0 nur.repos.bandithedoge.firefoxAddons.violentmonkey Userscript support for browsers, open source.

some-sass-language-server-2.3.1 nur.repos.bandithedoge.nodePackages.some-sass-language-server LSP server for SCSS and Sass indented. Full support for @use and @forward, including aliases, prefixes and hiding. Rich documentation through SassDoc. Workspace-wide code navigation and refactoring.

rnnoise-plugin-1.10 nur.repos.bandithedoge.rnnoise-plugin Noise suppression plugin based on Xiph's RNNoise

sg-323-1.0.1 nur.repos.bandithedoge.sg-323 Ursa Major Stargate 323 reverb emulation
sgdboop-bin-1.3.1 nur.repos.bandithedoge.sgdboop-bin A program used for applying custom artwork to Steam, using SteamGridDB
sheepshaver-bin-2025-10-11 nur.repos.bandithedoge.sheepshaver-bin A MacOS run-time environment for BeOS and Linux that allows you to run classic MacOS applications inside the BeOS/Linux multitasking environment
showmidi-bin-1.0.1 nur.repos.bandithedoge.showmidi-bin Multi-platform GUI application to effortlessly visualize MIDI activity
bandbreite-1.1.0 nur.repos.bandithedoge.sinuslabs.bandbreite Add warm, analog character to your drums, basses, and 808s
ko-1.3.0 nur.repos.bandithedoge.sinuslabs.ko KO is heavy hitting saturation and processing tool. Knockout power
reach-1.6.6 nur.repos.bandithedoge.sinuslabs.reach Extraterrestrial Reverb with a unique Sound
six-sines-1.1.0 nur.repos.bandithedoge.six-sines Small synthesizer which explores audio rate inter-modulation of signals
snd2acm-7.7j+0.0.1fix nur.repos.bandithedoge.snd2acm Sound to ACM converter based on The DragonLance Total Conversion Editor Pro (DLTCEP) code
snyk-ls-bin-20241112.105448 nur.repos.bandithedoge.snyk-ls-bin Language Server used by IDEs as Snyk Backend for Frontends
spectralsuite-2.2.0 nur.repos.bandithedoge.spectralsuite
squeezer-bin-standalone-2.5.4 nur.repos.bandithedoge.squeezer-bin Flexible general-purpose audio compressor with a touch of citrus
nerd-fonts-symbols-only-3.4.0 nur.repos.bandithedoge.symbols-nerd-font Nerd Fonts: Just the Nerd Font Icons. I.e Symbol font only
TAL-BassLine-101-latest nur.repos.bandithedoge.tal.bassline-101 TAL-BassLine-101 is an accurate emulation of the popular SH 101
TAL-Chorus-LX-latest nur.repos.bandithedoge.tal.chorus-lx TAL-Chorus-LX is a 1:1 copy of the chorus implemented in TAL-U-NO-LX
TAL-DAC-latest nur.repos.bandithedoge.tal.dac TAL-DAC brings back the character and sound of the 80's samplers and Lo-Fi devices in one effect plug-in. You can use it for subtle sound changes but also extreme effects.
TAL-Drum-latest nur.repos.bandithedoge.tal.drum TAL-Drum is a powerful audio plug-in that combines the nostalgic charm of vintage drum machines with modern usability. This intuitive tool lets you effortlessly create captivating beats with its meticulously sampled collection of iconic drum machine sounds.
TAL-Dub-X-latest nur.repos.bandithedoge.tal.dub-x TAL-Dub-X is a remake of our popular original freeware TAL-Dub plug-in with a lot of additional features
TAL-EQ-latest nur.repos.bandithedoge.tal.eq TAL-EQ is a versatile graphical equalizer designed for great sound, a fast workflow, and effortless usability
TAL-Filter-2-latest nur.repos.bandithedoge.tal.filter-2 TAL-Filter-2 is a host synced filter module with different filter types, panorama and volume modulation possibilities
TAL-G-Verb-latest nur.repos.bandithedoge.tal.g-verb TAL-G-Verb is a musical effect capable to build high quality artificial reverb sounds
TAL-J-8-latest nur.repos.bandithedoge.tal.j-8 TAL-J-8 is a synthesizer plug-in that meticulously emulates the legendary Jupiter 8 and is calibrated after our hardware device, delivering the most authentic and faithful reproduction of its iconic sound
TAL-Mod-latest nur.repos.bandithedoge.tal.mod TAL-Mod is a virtual analog synthesizer with an exceptional sound and almost unlimited modulation possiblities. Its special oscillator model is able to create a wide range of sounds, from classic mono to rich stereo leads, effects and pads.
TAL-NoiseMaker-latest nur.repos.bandithedoge.tal.noisemaker TAL-NoiseMaker is a virtual analog synthesizer with a great sound and low CPU usage. 128 factory presets included.
TAL-Pha-latest nur.repos.bandithedoge.tal.pha TAL-Pha is an instrument plug-in that emulates the sound of the analog 80's synthesizer Alpha Juno II (MKS-50 is the rack version)
TAL-Reverb-4-latest nur.repos.bandithedoge.tal.reverb-4 TAL-Reverb-4 is a high quality plate reverb with a vintage 80's character
TAL-Sampler-latest nur.repos.bandithedoge.tal.sampler TAL-Sampler is not just a sample player. It's a full featured analog modeled synthesizer with a sampler engine as sound source, including a powerful modulation matrix and high quality self-oscillating filters.
TAL-U-NO-LX-V2-latest nur.repos.bandithedoge.tal.u-no-lx TAL-U-NO-LX is a synthesizer plug-in that faithfully recreates the iconic sound of the analog Juno 60 synth. Each oscillator, filter, and envelope has been painstakingly modeled to capture the essence of the original hardware, delivering an unparalleled level of authenticity.
TAL-Vocoder-2-latest nur.repos.bandithedoge.tal.vocoder TAL-Vocoder is a vintage-style vocoder with 11 bands that produces the sound of vocoders from the early 80’s. We mixed analog-modeled components and usability with digital algorithms to create an outstanding vocoder sound.
terrain-1.2.2 nur.repos.bandithedoge.terrain Open Source Wave Terrain Synth
thorium-130.0.6723.174 nur.repos.bandithedoge.thorium-bin Chromium fork named after radioactive element No. 90

bassdrive-2.1.0 nur.repos.bandithedoge.tonelib.bassdrive Full Power of the Legendary Drive Pedal for the Highest String Gauges
easycomp-2.2.1 nur.repos.bandithedoge.tonelib.easycomp Powerful Compressor without any Complexity
noisereducer-2.0.2 nur.repos.bandithedoge.tonelib.noisereducer Powerful, yet simple two-unit rack effect on guard of your mix clarity
tubewarmth-2.0.1 nur.repos.bandithedoge.tonelib.tubewarmth The Vibrancy and Warmth of the Tube along with the Digital Precision and Clarity
zoom-4.3.1 nur.repos.bandithedoge.tonelib.zoom Best way to manage your Zoom processor
tonez-2.0.0 nur.repos.bandithedoge.tonez Free cross-platform polyphonic synthesizer

bootpart-edk2-rpi nur.repos.colinsane.bootpart-edk2-rpi unmanaged files to place in /boot on a Raspberry Pi 400 system.
these files are not enough on their own to boot a kernel,
but only to boot an EFI application.
best paired with systemd-boot (via `bootpart-systemd-boot`), or perhaps u-boot (untested).

fuse-3.17.4 nur.repos.colinsane.libfuse-sane provides `mount.fuse3.sane`, which behaves identically to `mount.fuse3` except
it supports an additional mount flag, `-o pass_fuse_fd`.

when mounting with `-o pass_fuse_fd`, `mount.fuse3.sane` opens the `/dev/fuse` device (which requires CAP_SYS_ADMIN),
and then `exec`s the userspace implementation, which inherits this file descriptor.
`mount.fuse3.sane` invokes the userspace implementation with the device argument set to something like `/dev/fd/3`, indicating which fd holds the fuse device.

the aim of this flag is to provide a clear handoff point at which the filesystem may drop CAP_SYS_ADMIN.
in this regard, it's much like `-o drop_privileges`, only it leaves the responsibility for that to the fs impl,
in case the fs needs to preserve _other_ privileges besides CAP_SYS_ADMIN.

ADCSKiller-d74bfea91f24a09df74262998d60f213609b45c6 nur.repos.exploitoverload.ADCSKiller ADCSKiller is a Python-based tool designed to automate the process of discovering and exploiting Active Directory Certificate Services (ADCS) vulnerabilities. It leverages features of Certipy and Coercer to simplify the process of attacking ADCS infrastructure.
BloodHound-4.3.1 nur.repos.exploitoverload.BloodHound BloodHound is a single page Javascript web application, built on top of Linkurious, compiled with Electron, with a Neo4j database fed by a C# data collector.

seclists-2023.2 nur.repos.exploitoverload.seclists SecLists is the security tester's companion. It's a collection of multiple types of lists used during security assessments, collected in one place. likwid-5.2.1 nur.repos.kapack.likwid Likwid is a simple to install and use toolsuite of command line applications and a library for performance oriented programmers. It works for Intel, AMD, ARMv8 and POWER9 processors on the Linux operating system. There is additional support for Nvidia GPUs. There is support for ARMv7 and POWER8 but there is currently no test machine in our hands to test them properly.
loguru-2.1.0 nur.repos.kapack.loguru A header-only C++ logging library

mosquitto-1.5.5 nur.repos.kapack.mosquitto-dcdb An open source MQTT v3.1/3.1.1 broker
NPB-3.4.2 nur.repos.kapack.npb The NAS Parallel Benchmarks (NPB) are a small set of programs designed to
help evaluate the performance of parallel supercomputers. The benchmarks
are derived from computational fluid dynamics (CFD) applications and
consist of five kernels and three pseudo-applications in the original
"pencil-and-paper" specification (NPB 1). The benchmark suite has been
extended to include new benchmarks for unstructured adaptive mesh,
parallel I/O, multi-zone applications, and computational grids. Problem
sizes in NPB are predefined and indicated as different classes. Reference
implementations of NPB are available in commonly-used programming models
like MPI and OpenMP (NPB 2 and NPB 3)

bilisponsorblock-0.12.1 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.bilisponsorblock 恰饭？桌子都给你掀了(/= _ =)/~┴┴ 带你精准空降到恰饭结束或者高能时刻，自动跳过视频中的赞助广告、订阅提醒等片段。你也可以亲自标记视频中的广告并上传，所有人都会从您的贡献中受益。

adds Codecov coverage data and line annotations to public and private repositories on GitHub.

- show CommaFeed in a popup
- open CommaFeed in a new tab
- open next unread article in a new tab

cookie-autodelete-3.8.2 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.cookie-autodelete Control your cookies! This WebExtension is inspired by Self Destructing Cookies. When a tab closes, any cookies not being used are automatically deleted. Keep the ones you trust (forever/until restart) while deleting the rest. Containers Supported
cookie-editor-1.13.0 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.cookie-editor Cookie-Editor lets you efficiently create, edit and delete a cookie for the current tab. Perfect for developing, quickly testing or even manually managing your cookies for your privacy.
cookie-quick-manager-0.5rc2 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.cookie-quick-manager An addon to manage cookies (view, search, create, edit, remove, backup, restore, protect from deletion and much more). Firefox 57+ is supported.
cookies-txt-1.0 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.cookies-txt Exports all cookies to a Netscape HTTP Cookie File, as used by curl, wget, and youtube-dl, among others.
copy-as-markdown-3.5.0 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.copy-as-markdown Copy Links, Tabs &amp; Images as Markdown via right clicks.

copy-link-to-highlight-1.0 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.copy-link-to-highlight Create a shareable link from any selected text on a webpage—just highlight, copy, and share!
copy-selected-links-2.4.1 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.copy-selected-links Right-click selected text to copy the URL of any links it contains.

dark-background-light-text-0.7.6 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.dark-background-light-text Make every web page (or just the pages you want) display light text on dark backgrounds. All color variations are fully customizable.
dark-mode-webextension-0.5.4 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.dark-mode-webextension A global dark theme for the web
dark-mode-website-switcher-2.0 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.dark-mode-website-switcher Adjusts the website's color scheme, so that all websites are dark by default, if they have a special design for that. It makes websites look dark even with a light system style.

dearrow-2.3.2 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.dearrow Crowdsourcing titles and thumbnails to be descriptive and not sensational
decentraleyes-3.0.0 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.decentraleyes Protects you against tracking through "free", centralized, content delivery. enhancer-for-youtube-2.0.130.1 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.enhancer-for-youtube Take control of YouTube and boost your user experience!
export-cookies-txt-0.3.2 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.export-cookies-txt Export cookies to a Netscape format cookies.txt file.
export-tabs-urls-and-titles-0.3.8 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.export-tabs-urls-and-titles List the URLs of all the open tabs and copy that list to clipboard or export it to a file.

Features:
- include titles
- custom format (e.g. markdown, html…)
- filter tabs
- limit to current window
- list non-HTTP(s) URLs
- ignore pinned tabs
exstatic-0.0.10 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.exstatic Zero effort language learning IMMERSION statistic collection and visualisation!

You read and get pretty stats and graphs to show your progress :)
external-application-0.6.0 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.external-application A highly customizable external application button and context-menu items
facebook-container-2.3.12 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.facebook-container Prevent Facebook from tracking you around the web. The Facebook Container extension for Firefox helps you take control and isolate your web activity from Facebook.
facebook-tracking-removal-1.13.0 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.facebook-tracking-removal Removes Ads and the user interaction tracking on Facebook™.
Modified elements can optionally have a custom CSS style applied to them so that cleaned items can be more easily identified.
fake-filler-4.1.0 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.fake-filler A form filler that fills all form inputs (textboxes, textareas, radio buttons, dropdowns, etc.) with fake and randomly generated data.

The purpose of this extension is to help developers and testers test forms quickly and easily.
fastforwardteam-0.2383 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.fastforwardteam Don't waste time with compliance. Use FastForward to skip annoying URL "shorteners".
fediact-0.9.8.7 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.fediact Simplifies interactions on other Mastodon instances than your own. Visit https://github.com/lartsch/FediAct for more.
feedbroreader-4.16.3 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.feedbroreader Advanced Feed Reader - Read news &amp; blogs or any RSS/Atom/RDF source.
ff2mpv-6.0.0 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.ff2mpv Tries to play links in mpv.

Press the toolbar button to play the current URL in mpv. Otherwise, right click on a URL and use the context item to play an arbitrary URL.

You'll need the native client here: github.com/woodruffw/ff2mpv
ficlab-1.0.113 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.ficlab Download fanfiction as ebook files from a number of popular sites. Simple to use, with beautiful results.
finicky-0.2.0 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.finicky The Official Finicky Browser Extension. Requires Finicky (macOS only). Opens links in other applications by right clicking them or clicking them while pressing alt.
firefox-color-2.1.7 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.firefox-color Build, save and share beautiful Firefox themes.
firefox-translations-1.3.4buildid20230720.091143 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.firefox-translations Translate websites in your browser, privately, without using the cloud. The functionality from this extension is now integrated into Firefox.
firemonkey-2.74 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.firemonkey Super Lightweight User Script and Style Manager
firenvim-0.2.16 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.firenvim Turn Firefox into a Neovim client.
flagfox-6.1.96 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.flagfox Displays a country flag depicting the location of the current website's server and provides a multitude of tools such as site safety checks, whois, translation, similar sites, validation, URL shortening, and more...
flexheaders-alter-http-headers-1.0.1 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.flexheaders-alter-http-headers A lightweight yet powerful extension to modify HTTP headers on the fly. Unleash the power of FlexHeaders, the ultimate extension for developers and security-conscious users
floccus-5.8.6 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.floccus Securely synchronize bookmarks across Chrome, Firefox, Edge, and more using your own cloud storage.
forget_me_not-2.2.8 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.forget_me_not Make the browser forget website data (like cookies, local storage, etc.), except for the data you want to keep by adding domains to a whitelist, graylist, blacklist, or redlist.
form-history-control-2.5.11.0 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.form-history-control Manage form history entries (search, edit, cleanup, export/import) and easy text formfiller.

Auto-save text entered in any form while typing to allow fast recovery when disaster strikes.
foxy-gestures-1.2.12 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.foxy-gestures Mouse gestures for Firefox. A web extension alternative to FireGestures created by a long time FireGestures user.
foxyproxy-standard-9.2 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.foxyproxy-standard FoxyProxy is an open-source, advanced proxy management tool that completely replaces Firefox's limited proxying capabilities. No paid accounts are necessary; bring your own proxies or buy from any vendor. The original proxy tool, since 2006.
foxytab-2.31 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.foxytab Collection of Tab Related Actions e.g. Duplicate, Close Duplicates, Close to the Left, Copy Title, Merge Windows, Save as PDF, Copy Urls Tab/All/Left/Right, Host keep/close/close other, Sort by URL/Title, Asce/Desc, Move, Reload, Reload Timer
fraidycat-1.1.10 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.fraidycat Follow from afar. Follow blogs, wikis, Twitter, Instagram, Tumblr - anyone on nearly any blog-like network - from your browser. No notifications, no unread messages, no 'inbox'. Just a single page overview of all your follows.
frame-extension-0.12.1 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.frame-extension This extension connects web apps to Frame. Frame is an Ethereum wallet that runs as a native desktop application. It manages all of your accounts, tokens and items and allows to seamlessly and securely connect them any app.
frankerfacez-4.80.4.0 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.frankerfacez The Twitch Enhancement Suite - Get custom emotes and tons of new features you'll never want to go without.
free-map-genie-2.1.1 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.free-map-genie Unlock mapgenie pro features for free
freedom-website-blocker-17.0.12 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.freedom-website-blocker The Freedom website blocker gives you control over distracting websites, so you can focus on what matters most.
french-dictionary-7.7 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.french-dictionary Spelling dictionary for the French language.
french-language-pack-150.0.20260327.90505 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.french-language-pack Firefox Language Pack for Français (fr) – French
furiganaize-0.7.2 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.furiganaize Auto insert furigana (振り仮名) on Japanese kanji.
fx_cast-0.3.1 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.fx_cast Chromecast Web Sender SDK implementation for Mozilla
gaidhlig-language-pack-150.0.20260327.90505 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.gaidhlig-language-pack Firefox Language Pack for Gàidhlig (gd) – Scottish Gaelic
gaoptout-1.0.8 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.gaoptout Tells the Google Analytics JavaScript not to send information to Google Analytics.
gemini-in-sidebar-1.0.0 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.gemini-in-sidebar Displays Gemini in the sidebar, provides customizable keyboard shortcut and toggle button.
geminize-1.0.4 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.geminize Explore Project Gemini sites from Firefox!
gesturefy-3.2.18 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.gesturefy Navigate, operate, and browse faster with mouse gestures! A customizable mouse gesture add-on with a variety of different commands.
ghostery-10.5.34 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.ghostery The best privacy tool and ad blocker extension for Firefox. Stop trackers, speed up websites and block ads everywhere including YouTube and Facebook.
ghosttext-24.8.10 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.ghosttext Use your text editor to write in your browser. Everything you type in the editor will be instantly updated in the browser (and vice versa).
gitako-github-file-tree-3.15.4 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.gitako-github-file-tree Gitako is a file tree extension for GitHub, available on Firefox, Chrome, and Edge.

Video intro: https://youtu.be/r4Ein-s2pN0
Homepage: https://github.com/EnixCoda/Gitako
github-file-icons-1.5.2 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.github-file-icons A Firefox Add-On which gives different filetypes different icons to GitHub, Gitlab, Bitbucket, gitea and gogs.
github-isometric-contributions-1.2.2 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.github-isometric-contributions Renders an isometric pixel view of GitHub contribution graphs.
github-issue-link-status-25.3.18 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.github-issue-link-status Colorize issue and PR links to see their status (open, closed, merged)
gloc-10.0.15 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.gloc Github Gloc - counts locs on GitHub pages
gnome-shell-integration-12.1 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.gnome-shell-integration This extension provides integration with GNOME Shell and the corresponding extensions repository https://extensions.gnome.org
gnu_terry_pratchett-0.5resigned1 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.gnu_terry_pratchett Display the X-Clacks-Overhead in Clacks Semaphore
google-cal-event-merge-2.2.1 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.google-cal-event-merge Chrome extension that visually merges the same event on multiple Google Calendars into one event.

Source: https://github.com/imightbeamy/gcal-multical-event-merge
google-container-1.5.4 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.google-container THIS IS NOT AN OFFICIAL ADDON FROM MOZILLA!
It is a fork of the Facebook Container addon.

Prevent Google from tracking you around the web. The Google Container extension helps you take control and isolate your web activity from Google.
gopass-bridge-2.1.1 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.gopass-bridge Gopass Bridge allows searching, inserting and managing login credentials from the gopass password manager.
grammalecte-fr-2.3.0 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.grammalecte-fr French grammar checker.
Included: conjugation tool, lexicographer, text formatter and spelling dictionaries.
grammarly-8.936.0 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.grammarly From blank page to polished draft, Grammarly’s AI helps you write faster and stronger. Get real-time grammar fixes, tone transformations, and instant content generation right where you write in Firefox.
granted-1.1.2 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.granted View multiple cloud accounts and regions in a single browser.
grasp-1.0.2.2 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.grasp A reliable way of capturing and tagging web pages and content
greasemonkey-4.13 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.greasemonkey Customize the way a web page displays or behaves, by using small bits of JavaScript.
gruvbox-dark-theme-1.1 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.gruvbox-dark-theme Gruvbox dark theme for Firefox. Using https://github.com/morhetz/gruvbox color palette
gsconnect-8 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.gsconnect Share links with GSConnect, direct to the browser or by SMS. Requires at least v7 of the Gnome Shell extension to function.
gumbo-twitch-companion-1.21.3 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.gumbo-twitch-companion Swollen companion keeping you updated on your Twitch experience
h264ify-1.1.0 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.h264ify Makes YouTube stream H.264 videos instead of VP8/VP9 videos
hackontext-1.4 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.hackontext Copy parameters to your favourite infosec tool.
hacktools-0.4.0 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.hacktools Hacktools, is a web extension facilitating your web application penetration tests, it includes cheat sheets as well as all the tools used during a test such as XSS payloads, Reverse shells to test your web application.
hcfy-10.14.1 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.hcfy 一站式划词 / 截图 / 网页全文 / 音视频 AI 翻译扩展，支持谷歌、DeepL、ChatGPT、百度等 9 个国内外主流翻译服务，均可用于全文翻译。能在 PDF 里使用。支持辅助键、快捷键、悬浮取词。
header-editor-5.2.9 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.header-editor Manage browser's requests, include modify the request headers and response headers, redirect requests, cancel requests
history-cleaner-1.7.0 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.history-cleaner Deletes browsing history older than a specified number of days.
historyblock-2.2 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.historyblock Cover your tracks!
hls-stream-detector-2.11.7 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.hls-stream-detector This addon provides an easy way to keep track of manifests and subtitles used by various streaming protocols. Also allows for detecting custom file types and downloading media files.
holodex-plus-0.5 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.holodex-plus Holodex.net companion extension for enhancing the viewing experience
hoppscotch-0.37 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.hoppscotch Removes CORS restrictions for cross-origin requests, particularly those to localhost. It essentially allows Hoppscotch to make requests that might otherwise be blocked by the browser's security policies.
hover-zoom-plus-1.1.12 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.hover-zoom-plus Zoom images/videos on all your favorite websites (Facebook, Amazon, etc). Simply hover your mouse over the image to enlarge it.
hulu-ad-blocker-1.0.0 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.hulu-ad-blocker Block All Hulu Ads, Stream Freely!
humble-new-tab-1.26.2 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.humble-new-tab Redesigned new tab page featuring your bookmarks, most visited, recently closed, and weather in a custom layout.
hyperchat-3.1.1 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.hyperchat Improved YouTube chat with CPU/RAM optimizations, customization options, and cutting-edge features!
i-auto-fullscreen-2.0.4 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.i-auto-fullscreen Open all Firefox windows in full screen mode
i-dont-care-about-cookies-3.5.0 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.i-dont-care-about-cookies Get rid of cookie warnings from almost all websites!
i2p-in-private-browsing-2.8.2 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.i2p-in-private-browsing Uses Container Tabs to set up a browser to use I2P conveniently and safely by setting up an I2P-powered Private Browsing mode, inspired by the similar feature in Brave. Requires an I2P router on the host system.
iina-open-in-mpv-2.4.3 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.iina-open-in-mpv Open videos and audio files in the mpv player and other compatible players.
image-max-url-2026.2.0 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.image-max-url Finds larger/original versions of images (supporting 10,000+ websites), including a powerful media popup feature
image-search-options-3.0.12 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.image-search-options A customizable reverse image search tool that conveniently presents a variety of top image search engines.
imagus-0.9.8.74 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.imagus With a simple mouse-over you can enlarge images and display images/videos from links.
imagus-mod-0.10.15 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.imagus-mod With a simple mouse-over you can enlarge and display images/videos from links. Now with optional permissions, more features.
immersive-translate-1.26.5 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.immersive-translate Free Translate Website, Translate PDF &amp; Epub eBook, Translate Video Subtitles in Bilingual
improved-intra-4.4.0 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.improved-intra The ultimate browser extension for 42's Intranet, adding many improvements, such as dark mode, customizable profiles and much more!
improved-tube-4.2026 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.improved-tube Youtube Extension. Powerful but lightweight. Enrich your Youtube and content selection. Make YouTube tidy and smart! (Layout, Filters, Shortcuts, Playlist)
impulse-blocker-1.2.0 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.impulse-blocker Block distracting websites. Just list the sites you want Impulse Blocker to pause or completely avoid.
incognito-normal-1.2.1resigned1 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.incognito-normal Quickly switch current tab, link or search text to Google from incognito window to normal window, or vice versa.
indie-wiki-buddy-3.14.2 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.indie-wiki-buddy Helping you discover quality, independent wikis!

When visiting a Fandom wiki, Indie Wiki Buddy redirects or alerts you of independent alternatives. It also filters search engine results. BreezeWiki is also supported, to reduce clutter on Fandom.
inkah-1.0.43 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.inkah Look up Chinese &amp; Korean words. Split sentences into their individual words. Learn while browsing the web by hovering words and learn from Youtube and Netflix with double subtitles.
inlinedisposition-reloaded-2.0.2resigned1 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.inlinedisposition-reloaded InlineDisposition Reloaded changes the disposition type of "Content-Disposition" response headers from "attachment" and "file" to "inline"
instapaper-official-3.1.3 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.instapaper-official Instapaper is a simple tool for saving web pages to read later on your iPhone, iPad, Android, computer, or Kindle. The Instapaper browser extension may be used to save the current page directly into your Instapaper account.
ipfs-companion-3.3.0 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.ipfs-companion Harness the power of IPFS in your browser
ipvfoo-2.32 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.ipvfoo Display the server IP address, with a realtime summary of IPv4, IPv6, and HTTPS information across all page elements.
istilldontcareaboutcookies-1.1.9 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.istilldontcareaboutcookies Community version of the popular extension "I don't care about cookies"

https://github.com/OhMyGuus/I-Dont-Care-About-Cookies
jabref-3.0 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.jabref Browser extension for users of the bibliographic reference manager JabRef.
It automatically identifies and extracts bibliographic information on websites and sends them to JabRef with one click.
javascript-restrictor-0.21 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.javascript-restrictor JShelter controls the APIs provided by the browser. The goal is to improve the privacy and security of the user running the extension.
joplin-web-clipper-2.11.2 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.joplin-web-clipper Capture and save web pages and screenshots from your browser to Joplin. The Joplin application is required to get this extension working - https://joplinapp.org
js-search-extension-0.1 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.js-search-extension The ultimate search extension for Javascript!
jump-cutter-1.32.2 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.jump-cutter Watch videos up to 2x faster by automatically skipping long pauses between sentences
justdeleteme-1.6.0 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.justdeleteme JustDeleteMe.xyz extension for Firefox-based browsers.
kagi-privacy-pass-1.0.8 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.kagi-privacy-pass Enables use of Privacy Pass to authenticate with Kagi Search.
kagi-search-0.7.6 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.kagi-search A simple helper extension for setting Kagi as a default search engine, and automatically logging in to Kagi in private browsing windows.
kagi-translate-0.1.8 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.kagi-translate Translate text and webpages directly in your browser using Kagi's private translation engine. No tracking, no data collection.
karakeep-1.2.9 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.karakeep An extension to bookmark links to karakeep.app
keepa-4.19 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.keepa → Price History charts
→ Price Drop &amp; Availability Alerts
→ Over 1 billion tracked products
→ Supports Amazon .com | .co.uk | .de | .co.jp | .fr | .ca | .it | .es | .in | .mx
keepass-helper-1.4resigned1 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.keepass-helper Puts a hostname or a URL in the window title.
It does not modify the title of a tab, just the window title.
It does not inject any JavaScript code to a website, so it can't corrupt, nor can it be corrupted by it.
keepassxc-browser-1.10.0.1 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.keepassxc-browser Official browser plugin for the KeePassXC password manager (https://keepassxc.org).
keeper-password-manager-17.5.0 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.keeper-password-manager Protect and autofill passwords with the world's most trusted and #1 downloaded secure password manager and digital vault.
keybase-1.10.17resigned1 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.keybase A secure chat button for every profile.
kiss-translator-2.0.20 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.kiss-translator A simple bilingual translation extension &amp; Greasemonkey script
kristofferhagen-nord-theme-2.0 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.kristofferhagen-nord-theme Firefox theme inspired by https://www.nordtheme.com/
laboratory-by-mozilla-3.0.8 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.laboratory-by-mozilla Because good website security shouldn't only be available to mad scientists! Laboratory is a WebExtension that helps you generate a Content Security Policy (CSP) header for your website.
languagetool-10.0.9 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.languagetool With this extension you can check text with the style and grammar checker LanguageTool. It finds many errors that a simple spell checker cannot detect, like mixing up there/their, a/an, or repeating a word.
lastpass-password-manager-4.151.1 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.lastpass-password-manager LastPass, an award-winning password manager, saves your passwords and gives you secure access from every computer and mobile device.
leechblock-ng-1.7.2 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.leechblock-ng LeechBlock NG is a simple productivity tool designed to block those time-wasting sites that can suck the life out of your working day. All you need to do is specify which sites to block and when to block them.
lemmy-keyboard-navigation-2.8 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.lemmy-keyboard-navigation Easily navigate Lemmy with your keyboard.
less-mixes-for-youtube-3.1.2 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.less-mixes-for-youtube Prevent YouTube Mix generation for music videos
lesspass-11.0.10 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.lesspass Use LessPass add-on to generate complex passwords and log in automatically to all your sites
lexicon-1.7.0 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.lexicon Quickly Define Words While You Browse By Just Double Clicking On The Word, Create and Organize Your Own Word Bank With Personal Dictionary
libkey-nomad-1.55.1 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.libkey-nomad One-click access to millions of scholarly articles.
libredirect-3.3.0 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.libredirect Redirects YouTube, Twitter, TikTok... requests to alternative privacy friendly frontends.
limit-limit-distracting-sites-0.1.4 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.limit-limit-distracting-sites Limit your time spent on distracting sites. Limit is an extension that allows you to set time limits for distracting websites.
lingq-importer2-2.3.41 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.lingq-importer2 Automatically import foreign language pages, videos, movies from the web &amp; study them with LingQ's web &amp; mobile language learning apps.
link-cleaner-1.6resigned1 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.link-cleaner Clean URLs that are about to be visited:
- removes utm_* parameters
- on item pages of aliexpress and amazon, removes tracking parameters
- skip redirect pages of facebook, steam and reddit
link-gopher-2.6.2 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.link-gopher Extracts all links from web page, sorts them, removes duplicates, and displays them in a new tab for inspection or copy and paste into other systems.
linkding-extension-1.15.0 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.linkding-extension Companion extension for the linkding bookmark manager
linkding-injector-1.3.10 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.linkding-injector Injects search results from the linkding bookmark service into search pages like google and duckduckgo
linkhints-1.3.3 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.linkhints Click with your keyboard.
linkwarden-1.5.2 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.linkwarden The browser extension for Linkwarden.
livetl-9.0.9 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.livetl Get live translations for YouTube and Twitch streams, crowdsourced from multilingual viewers!
llmfeeder-2.1.0 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.llmfeeder Convert web pages to clean Markdown for ChatGPT, Claude and AI. Multi-tab support, right-click menus, token counter. 100% offline.
localcdn-2.6.84 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.localcdn Emulates remote frameworks (e.g. jQuery, Bootstrap, AngularJS) and delivers them as local resource. Prevents unnecessary 3rd party requests to Google, StackPath, MaxCDN and more. Prepared rules for uBlock Origin/uMatrix.
lockedin-yt-1.1.2 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.lockedin-yt Hide YouTube Shorts, Feed, Irrelevant Search Results and many more with LockedIn, Plus its OPEN SOURCE!
lovely-forks-3.7.3 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.lovely-forks Show notable forks of Github projects.
mailvelope-6.2.0 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.mailvelope Protect your email conversations and attachments on Gmail, Nextcloud, Outlook and more with PGP and end-to-end encryption.
mal-sync-0.12.2 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.mal-sync MAL-Sync enables automatic episode tracking between MyAnimeList/Anilist/Kitsu/Simkl and multiple anime streaming websites.
markdownload-3.2.0 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.markdownload This extension works like a web clipper, but it downloads articles in a markdown format. Turndown and Readability.js are used as core libraries. It is not guaranteed to work with all websites.
material-icons-for-github-1.13.1 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.material-icons-for-github Replace the file/folder icons on github file browsers with icons representing the file's type and which tool it is used by.
matte-black-red-2022.2.23 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.matte-black-red A modern dark / Matte Black theme with a red accent color.
Click my name for more accents (request if not available).
maya-dark-1.0 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.maya-dark Deep purple pink solid theme. Hopefully comfortable to use and fairly easy on the eyes.
maya-light-1.0 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.maya-light Soft pastel pink light theme with a few darker Evil maya accents. Fairly bright but should be comfortable for most users.
media-url-timestamper-1.1.6 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.media-url-timestamper Remember audio/video playback position for later resuming without cookies, storage or logging in by automatically timestamping the address. Compatible with Youtube, SoundCloud, Invidious and others.
mergify-1.0.37 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.mergify Mergify extension for GitHub
metager-suche-1.25 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.metager-suche Privacy has never been so easy. Sets MetaGer as your default search engine and manages search settings for you.

nyaa-linker-2.4.3 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.nyaa-linker Adds a button to Anime and Manga database websites that opens a relevant Nyaa search
octolinker-6.10.5 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.octolinker It turns language-specific module-loading statements like include, require or import into links. Depending on the language it will either redirect you to the referenced file or to an external website like a manual page or another service.
octotree-8.2.4 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.octotree GitHub on steroids

onepassword-password-manager-8.12.4.46 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.onepassword-password-manager The best way to experience 1Password in your browser. Easily sign in to sites, generate passwords, and store secure information, including logins, credit cards, notes, and more.
onetab-2.13 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.onetab Save up to 95% memory and reduce tab clutter
open-in-browser-2.11 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.open-in-browser Offers the possibility to display documents in the browser window.
open-in-freedium-1.2.0 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.open-in-freedium Easily open Medium articles in Freedium to bypass restrictions
open-in-vlc-0.4.4 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.open-in-vlc Adds a context menu item to send audio/video streams directly to VLC media player
open-url-in-container-1.0.3 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.open-url-in-container This extension enables support for opening links in specific containers using custom protocol handler. It works for terminal, OS shortcuts and regular HTML pages.
org-capture-0.2.2resigned1 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.org-capture A helper for capturing things via org-protocol in emacs: First, set up: http://orgmode.org/worg/org-contrib/org-protocol.html or https://github.com/sprig/org-capture-extension

See https://youtu.be/zKDHto-4wsU for example usage
overbitewx-0.4.2resigned1 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.overbitewx Re-enables the Gopher protocol in Firefox 56 and above, allowing you to enter Gopher URLs and click on Gopher links. Because WebExtensions does not yet have a TCP sockets API, this version redirects your requests to the Floodgap Public Gopher Proxy.
overview-0.5.1resigned1 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.overview Give an overview of a page's headings in a sidebar. The sidebar has links towards each heading in the current page, making it easy to understand the structure and navigate inside the page.

passff-1.23 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.passff Add-on that allows users of the unix password manager 'pass' to access their password store from Firefox
pay-by-privacy-2.4.15 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.pay-by-privacy Privacy's Firefox add-on allows you to generate a new virtual card number with 1-click on any checkout page. Keep your payment info safe from data breaches, shady merchants, and sneaky subscription billing.

save-all-images-webextension-0.8.5 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.save-all-images-webextension Easily save images with a wide range of customization features, such as file size, dimensions, and image type.
save-my-chatbot-4.0.0 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.save-my-chatbot 🚀 Download Claude, Perplexity, Phind, ChatGPT and MaxAI-Google knowledge into markdown files!
save-page-we-28.11 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.save-page-we Save a complete web page (as currently displayed) as a single HTML file that can be opened in any browser. Save a single page, multiple selected pages or a list of page URLs. Automate saving from command line.
scots-language-pack-150.0.20260327.90505 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.scots-language-pack Firefox Language Pack for Scots (sco)
screenshot-capture-annotate-4.3.7.21 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.screenshot-capture-annotate Full page screen capture and screen recorder 2 in 1. Share screencast video instantly.
scroll_anywhere-9.2 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.scroll_anywhere Scroll page without touching scroll-bar!
Press Middle (Right / Left) mouse button anywhere on the page to scroll just like with scrollbar.

Features also:
- "grab and drag" scrolling
- customizable scrollbars!
- the Momentum auto-scroll
search-by-image-8.5.0 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.search-by-image A powerful reverse image search tool, with support for various search engines, such as Google, Bing, Yandex, Baidu and TinEye.
search-engines-helper-3.5.0 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.search-engines-helper Add a custom search engine and export/import all the search urls and icon urls for all search engines added to Firefox.
semantic-scholar-0.3.9 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.semantic-scholar Quickly view research papers and search results on Semantic Scholar, the free, AI-powered academic search engine from the Allen Institute for AI (AI2).

Advanced Session Manager: edit, save, change, restore.
It can also be your best Bookmark Manager

shaarli-2.2.2 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.shaarli Cette extension remplace le bookmarklet officiel et intègre un bouton « Shaarli » dans la barre des modules.
shinigami-eyes-1.0.37 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.shinigami-eyes Highlights transphobic/anti-LGBT and trans-friendly subreddits/facebook pages/groups with different colors.

Supports Reddit, Twitter, Facebook, Tumblr, Medium, YouTube, Wikipedia, search engine results and all sites with Disqus comments.
