shortkeys-2.0.20 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.shortkeys Create custom keyboard shortcuts for your browser: 125+ built-in actions, macros, shortcut packs, command palette, cloud sync, and more.
side-view-0.6.6956 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.side-view Open a mobile view of a page in the sidebar
sidebery-5.5.0 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.sidebery Vertical tabs tree and bookmarks in sidebar with advanced containers configuration, grouping and many other features.
simple-dark-vlasak-3.0 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.simple-dark-vlasak A simple dark high contrast theme with a tone of cyan.
simple-modify-header-1.9.0 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.simple-modify-header The extension rewrite the header (request or response) based on a rules table. It 's possible to add, modify or remove header fields for a choosen url pattern. It's possible to import/export the configuration
simple-tab-groups-5.3.2 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.simple-tab-groups Create, modify, and quickly change tab groups
simple-translate-3.0.1 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.simple-translate Quickly translate selected or typed text on web pages. Supports Google Translate and DeepL API.
simplelogin-3.0.7 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.simplelogin Create a different email for each website to hide your real email. Guard your inbox against spams, phishing. Protect your privacy.
simplifygmail-3.4.2 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.simplifygmail Your time and attention matter -- Simplify Gmail enhances Gmail to boost productivity, strengthen privacy, and reduce stress. From the co-founder of Google Inbox.
single-file-1.22.98 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.single-file Save an entire web page—including images and styling—as a single HTML file.
skip-redirect-2.3.6 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.skip-redirect Some web pages use intermediary pages before redirecting to a final page. This add-on tries to extract the final url from the intermediary url and goes there straight away if successful.
smart-referer-0.2.15 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.smart-referer Improve your privacy by limiting Referer information leak!

Please note that this extension has been largely superseded by better browser defaults for websites using HTTPS (almost all) and is not maintained anymore.
smartproxy-2.1 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.smartproxy SmartProxy is a smart automatic proxy switcher that will automatically enable/disable proxy for the sites you visit, based on customizable rules.
snoozetabs-1.1.2resigned1 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.snoozetabs Snooze Tabs help you focus your attention online, whether you want to remove distractions for now or save something for later. Hit the snooze icon to dismiss tabs you don’t want now, and set an alarm to bring them back when you need them.
snowflake-0.9.8 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.snowflake Help people in censored countries access the Internet without restrictions. Once you install and enable the extension, wait for the snowflake icon to turn green, this means a censored user is connecting through your extension to access the Internet!
solarize-fox-2.3.6 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.solarize-fox Relax for your eyes.
Sidebar and new tab included.
solarized-light-2.0 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.solarized-light Uh-oh! Looks like somebody left Firefox out in the sun.

Credit to Ethan Schoonover for the color scheme.

http://ethanschoonover.com/solarized
solarized_fox-3.0 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.solarized_fox Solarized Dark theme, using blue backgrounds with yellow highlights
sonarr-radarr-lidarr-search-3.0.1.0 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.sonarr-radarr-lidarr-search Exposes a context menu that enables direct searching for tv shows, movies or artists in Sonarr, Radarr &amp; Lidarr.

See description for a list of integrated sites.
sourcegraph-23.4.14.1343 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.sourcegraph Adds code intelligence to GitHub, GitLab, Bitbucket Server, and Phabricator: hovers, definitions, references. Supports 20+ languages.
sponsorblock-6.1.2 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.sponsorblock Easily skip YouTube video sponsors. When you visit a YouTube video, the extension will check the database for reported sponsors and automatically skip known sponsors. You can also report sponsors in videos. Other browsers: https://sponsor.ajay.app
spoof-timezone-0.4.9 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.spoof-timezone This extension alters browser timezone to a random or user-defined value.
startpage-private-search-2.0.3 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.startpage-private-search This extension protects users from being tracked while allowing them to search the web in complete private mode.
startup-bookmarks-1.7.18 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.startup-bookmarks Open a set of bookmarks on browser startup
statshunters-3.2.4 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.statshunters Show tiles on Strava, Komoot, Brouter, RWGPS, Garmin and Mapy.cz route builder
steam-database-4.33 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.steam-database Adds SteamDB links and new features on the Steam store and community. View lowest game prices and stats.
streetpass-for-mastodon-2024.1 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.streetpass-for-mastodon Find your people on Mastodon
stylebot-web-3.1.3 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.stylebot-web Change the appearance of the web instantly
stylus-2.3.19 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.stylus Redesign your favorite websites with Stylus, an actively developed and community driven userstyles manager. Easily install custom themes from popular online repositories, or create, edit, and manage your own personalized CSS stylesheets.
substitoot-0.7.2.0 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.substitoot A transparent toot fetcher for Mastodon. Loads missing replies to boosted toots in your feed directly from the source server.

Make sure you set your home instance(s) in preferences to start using this!
super-agent-3.48 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.super-agent Super Agent automatically fills out website's cookie consent forms for you based on your preferences. Super Agent will save you a lot of clicks and let you take control of your privacy in a very easy way.
surfingkeys-1.17.11 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.surfingkeys Rich shortcuts for you to click links / switch tabs / scroll pages or DIVs / capture full page or DIV etc, let you use the browser like vim, plus an embed vim editor.

https://github.com/brookhong/Surfingkeys
swedish-dictionary-1.21 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.swedish-dictionary Swedish spell-check dictionary.
swift-selection-search-3.49.0 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.swift-selection-search Swiftly access your search engines in a popup panel when you select text in a webpage. Context menu also included!
switchyomega-2.5.10 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.switchyomega Manage and switch between multiple proxies quickly &amp; easily.
tab-counter-plus-3.4 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.tab-counter-plus Shows the number of tabs in each window. Efficient and customizable.
tab-reloader-0.6.6 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.tab-reloader An easy-to-use tab reloader with custom reloading time settings for individual tabs
tab-retitle-1.5.2 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.tab-retitle Change tab titles easily!
+ Persists through sessions
+ Domain level re-titling
+ Regex replacements
and much more!
tab-session-manager-7.3.0 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.tab-session-manager Save and restore the state of windows and tabs. It also supports automatic saving and cloud sync.
tab-stash-3.4 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.tab-stash Easily save and organize batches of tabs as bookmarks. Clear your tabs, clear your mind. Only for Firefox.
tab-unload-for-tree-style-tab-6.17 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.tab-unload-for-tree-style-tab Tab unload options for Tree Style Tab.
tabcenter-reborn-3.0.2 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.tabcenter-reborn Simple and powerful vertical tab bar
tabliss-2.6.0 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.tabliss A beautiful New Tab page with many customisable backgrounds and widgets that does not require any permissions.
tabwrangler-7.8.0 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.tabwrangler Automatically closes inactive tabs and makes it easy to get them back
tampermonkey-5.4.1 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.tampermonkey Tampermonkey is the world's most popular userscript manager.
tasks-for-canvas-1.3.2 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.tasks-for-canvas A better to-do list sidebar for Canvas. The Tasks browser extension for Canvas™ updates the Canvas dashboard sidebar to show all of your weekly assignments and track your progress throughout the week.
temporary-containers-1.9.2 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.temporary-containers Open tabs, websites, and links in automatically managed disposable containers which isolate the data websites store (cookies, storage, and more) from each other, enhancing your privacy and security while you browse.
temporary-containers-plus-2.0.7 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.temporary-containers-plus Open tabs, websites, and links in automatically managed disposable containers. Containers isolate the data websites store (cookies, cache, and more) from each other, further enhancing your privacy while you browse.
terms-of-service-didnt-read-5.1.1 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.terms-of-service-didnt-read “I have read and agree to the Terms” is the biggest lie on the web. We aim to fix that. Get informed instantly about websites' terms &amp; privacy policies, with ratings and summaries from the www.tosdr.org initiative.
tetrio-plus-0.27.7 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.tetrio-plus Custom skins, background music, sound effects, (animated) backgrounds, input display, and touch control support for TETR.IO.
text-contrast-for-dark-themes-2.1.6 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.text-contrast-for-dark-themes Fixes low-contrast text when using a dark desktop theme.
textern-0.8 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.textern Edit text in your favourite external editor!
the-camelizer-price-history-ch-3.0.15 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.the-camelizer-price-history-ch Add price history charts and price watch features to Firefox when viewing product pages on Amazon. Use it to make informed purchasing decisions and to receive price drop alerts via email, Twitter, or RSS feed.
theater-mode-for-youtube-0.2.5 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.theater-mode-for-youtube Force YouTube to open in its player in the theater mode
theme-nord-polar-night-1.18 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.theme-nord-polar-night https://paypal.me/christosbouronikos
themesong-for-youtube-music-1.3.0 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.themesong-for-youtube-music Enhancer for YouTube Music™. Dynamic Themes, Visualizers, Lyrics, Sleep Timer, and more!
time-zone-converter-savvy-time-1.10 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.time-zone-converter-savvy-time Time zone and local time converter. Compare and convert time between many locations at a time.
to-deepl-0.9.3 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.to-deepl Right-click on a section of text and click on "To DeepL" to translate it to your language. Default language is selected in extension preferences.
to-google-translate-4.3.1 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.to-google-translate Right-click a section of text and click the Translate icon next to it to text translate or listen to it in your language.
toggl-button-time-tracker-4.11.10 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.toggl-button-time-tracker Puts a timer into any web tool and allows quick real time productivity tracking with all the data stored on your Toggl Track account. Time tracking has never been easier!
tokyo-night-v2-1.0 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.tokyo-night-v2 A Tokyo Night theme, based on enkia's VS Code theme. There are other Tokyo Night themes in the addons store, but none of them actually had the right colors, so I decided to make my own.
tomato-clock-7.2.0 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.tomato-clock A simple browser extension for managing your productivity
toolkit-for-ynab-3.20.0 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.toolkit-for-ynab UI customizations and tweaks for the web version of YNAB.
topcashback-cashback-coupons-7.5.0.0 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.topcashback-cashback-coupons Join over 25m members worldwide and earn cashback when you shop online at over 4,000 online stores with the highest cashback rates.
torrent-control-0.2.47 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.torrent-control Send torrent and magnet links to your Bittorrent client's web interface. Supports BiglyBT, Cloud Torrent, Deluge, Flood, ruTorrent, Synology Download Station, Tixati, Transmission, tTorrent, µTorrent, Vuze and qBittorrent.
tournesol-3.11.0 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.tournesol See Tournesol recommendations on YouTube, and easily contribute to the project.
toxcancel-1.3 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.toxcancel Redirects to xcancel.com (a mirror of x) when the browser is about to load an x.com page
tranquility-1-3.0.26 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.tranquility-1 Tranquility Reader improves the readability of web articles by removing unnecessary elements like ads, images, social sharing widgets, and other distracting fluff.
translate-web-pages-10.1.1.1 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.translate-web-pages Translate your page in real time using Google, Bing or Yandex.
It is not necessary to open new tabs.
transparent-standalone-image-2.2resigned1 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.transparent-standalone-image This add-on renders standalone images on a transparent background, so you can see the image in all its glory!
transparent-zen-0.7.1 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.transparent-zen Applies custom styles to make your favorite websites transparent.
tree-style-tab-4.2.12 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.tree-style-tab Show tabs like a tree.
tridactyl-1.24.5 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.tridactyl Vim, but in your browser. Replace Firefox's control mechanism with one modelled on Vim.

This addon is very usable, but is in an early stage of development. We intend to implement the majority of Vimperator's features.
trilium-web-clipper-1.0.1 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.trilium-web-clipper Save web clippings to Trilium Notes
tst-active-tab-on-scroll-bar-1.3.2 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.tst-active-tab-on-scroll-bar Provides a marker to indicate active tab position in Tree Style Tab sidebar.
tst-bookmarks-subpanel-2.0 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.tst-bookmarks-subpanel Provides a bookmarks subpanel for Tree Style Tab's sidebar.
tst-fade-old-tabs-1.0.2 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.tst-fade-old-tabs This TST addon fades away tabs that hasn't been visited for a while
tst-indent-line-1.3.3 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.tst-indent-line Provides indent line for Tree Style Tab sidebar.
tst-lock-tree-collapsed-1.4.3 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.tst-lock-tree-collapsed Provides ability to lock trees in Tree Style Tab as collapsed.
tst-more-tree-commands-1.5.1 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.tst-more-tree-commands Provides extra tree manipulation commands for Tree Style Tab.
tst-tab-search-0.0.7 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.tst-tab-search Search for or filter the Tabs in TST's sidebar, and quickly find and activate them.
tst-wheel-and-double-1.5.10 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.tst-wheel-and-double This add-on requires Tree Style Tab. It extends Tree Style Tab to allow tab changing by mouse wheel scrolling and reloading a tab when double clicking it.
tubearchivist-companion-0.4.2 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.tubearchivist-companion Interact with your selfhosted TA server.
tunnelbear-vpn-firefox-3.6.1 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.tunnelbear-vpn-firefox TunnelBear is a simple app that helps you browse the Internet privately and securely. TunnelBear changes your IP and protects your browsing data from online threats, letting you access your favorite websites and apps worldwide.
tweaks-for-youtube-3.87.0 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.tweaks-for-youtube Seek, navigate chapters, control volume, speed, and more with mouse and keyboard shortcuts. Adjust player controls, progress bar, subtitles, process audio, show playlist duration, take video snapshot, set initial volume, speed, resolution, and more.
twitch-auto-points-1.3.2 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.twitch-auto-points Automatic twitch channel points collection. Click on the icon to disable the extension (becomes grey). If the icon is colorful, it means it's working. Wait for the collect points button to appear on the screen and see it being automatically claimed.
ublacklist-9.4.0 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.ublacklist Blocks sites you specify from appearing in Google search results
ublock-origin-1.70.0 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.ublock-origin Finally, an efficient wide-spectrum content blocker. Easy on CPU and memory.
ublock-origin-1.70.0 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.ublock-origin-upstream Finally, an efficient wide-spectrum content blocker. Easy on CPU and memory.
ubo-scope-1.5.0 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.ubo-scope A tool to measure your 3rd-party exposure score for web sites you visit.
ubolite-2026.301.2014 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.ubolite An efficient content blocker based on the MV3 API.
ukrainian-dictionary-6.7.5 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.ukrainian-dictionary Ukrainian (uk-UA) spellchecking dictionary
umatrix-1.4.4 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.umatrix Point &amp; click to forbid/allow any class of requests made by your browser. Use it to block scripts, iframes, ads, facebook, etc.
undoclosetabbutton-8.1.0 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.undoclosetabbutton Allows you to restore the tab you just closed with a single click—plus it can offer a list of recently closed tabs within a convenient context menu.
unofficial-saladict-popup-dictionary-7.20.0 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.unofficial-saladict-popup-dictionary Saladict is an all-in-one professional pop-up dictionary and page translator which supports multiple search modes, page translations, new word notebook and PDF selection searching. This distribution is UNOFFICIAL. Remove it if you don't trust it.
unpaywall-3.98 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.unpaywall Get free text of research papers as you browse, using Unpaywall's index of ten million legal, open-access articles.
untrap-for-youtube-8.3.1 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.untrap-for-youtube Summarize YouTube videos with AI and Hide Distractions: shorts, ads, comments, related, suggestions, and more.
unwanted-twitch-25.11.7 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.unwanted-twitch Hide unwanted streams, games, categories, channels and tags on: twitch.tv
uppity-2.2resigned1 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.uppity Navigate up one level (directory). It will remove an in-page anchor, the querystring, the file, and the last directory in that order, whichever is first found...
user-agent-string-switcher-0.6.6 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.user-agent-string-switcher Spoof websites trying to gather information about your web navigation—like your browser type and operating system—to deliver distinct content you may not want.
userchrome-toggle-1.2 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.userchrome-toggle This extension allows you to toggle userchrome.css styles on-the-fly with buttons and hotkeys.
userchrome-toggle-extended-2.0.1 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.userchrome-toggle-extended This extension allows you to toggle userchrome.css styles on-the-fly with buttons and hotkeys. You'll be able to switch up to six styles
varia-integrator-1.5 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.varia-integrator Route all downloads to Varia if it's running.
video-downloadhelper-10.2.5.2 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.video-downloadhelper Download videos from the web. Easy, smart, no tracking.
video-resumer-1.2.4resigned1 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.video-resumer Automatically resumes YouTube videos from where you played them last. Without this extension, for example, when you click through YouTube videos, back and forth, they always start from the beginning.
videospeed-0.6.3.3 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.videospeed Speed up, slow down, advance and rewind any HTML5 video with quick shortcuts.
view-image-5.2.0 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.view-image Re-implements the google image, "View Image" button.
vim-vixen-1.2.3 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.vim-vixen Accelerates your web browsing with Vim power!!
vimium-2.4.2 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.vimium The Hacker's Browser. Vimium provides keyboard shortcuts for navigation and control in the spirit of Vim.
vimium-c-2.12.3 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.vimium-c A keyboard shortcut tool for keyboard-based page navigation and browser tab operations with an advanced omnibar and global shortcuts
violentmonkey-2.35.0 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.violentmonkey Userscript support for browsers, open source.
visbug-0.4.6 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.visbug Open source browser design tools
vue-js-devtools-7.7.7 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.vue-js-devtools DevTools extension for debugging Vue.js applications.
w2g-10.8 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.w2g With Watch2Gether you can watch videos together with your friends. Enhance your Watch2Gether experience with our official browser extension.
wakatimes-4.1.0 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.wakatimes Automatic time tracking for Firefox.
wallabagger-1.22.0 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.wallabagger This wallabag v2 extension has the ability to edit title and tags and set starred, archived, or delete states.
You can add a page from the icon or through the right click menu on a link or on a blank page spot.
wappalyzer-6.11.1 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.wappalyzer Identify technologies on websites
watchmarker-for-youtube-5.0.4 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.watchmarker-for-youtube Automatically mark videos on Youtube that you have already watched.
wave-accessibility-tool-3.2.7.1 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.wave-accessibility-tool Evaluate web accessibility within the Firefox browser. When activated, the WAVE extension injects icons and indicators into your page to give feedback about accessibility and to facilitate manual evaluation.
wayback-machine-3.2 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.wayback-machine Welcome to the Official Internet Archive Wayback Machine Browser Extension! Go back in time to see how a website has changed through the history of the Web. Save websites, view missing 404 Not Found pages, or read archived books &amp; papers.
web-archives-7.3.0 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.web-archives View archived and cached versions of web pages on various search engines, such as the Wayback Machine and Archive․is.
web-clipper-obsidian-1.0.2 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.web-clipper-obsidian Save and highlight web pages in a private and durable format that you can access offline. The official browser extension for Obsidian.
web-developer-3.0.1 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.web-developer The Web Developer extension adds various web developer tools to the browser.
web-eid-2.2.1 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.web-eid Use your electronic identification card for secure authentication and digital signing.
web-scrobbler-3.18.0 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.web-scrobbler Scrobble music all around the web!
web-search-navigator-0.5.2 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.web-search-navigator Boost your searching productivity with Web Search Navigator! Adds keyboard shortcuts to navigate within Google Search results.
webhint-2.4.17 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.webhint Check for best practices and common errors with your site's accessibility, speed, security and more.
webxr-api-emulator-0.3.3 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.webxr-api-emulator Emulate WebXR devices on your browser
whowrotethat-0.22.4.0 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.whowrotethat Explore authorship and revision information visually and directly in Wikipedia articles. Powered by WikiWho.
widegithub-3.3.3 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.widegithub Makes GitHub wide on Mozilla Firefox.

Supports GitHub, private Gists, GitHub Enterprise, and custom domains (TLDs).
wikipedia-first-1.0 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.wikipedia-first Reorders Google and DuckDuckGo search results so Wikipedia is on top.
wikipedia-vector-skin-1.3 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.wikipedia-vector-skin This extension restores the old Wikipedia Layout and Design by appending "?useskin=vector" to Wikipedia URLs.
wikiwand-wikipedia-modernized-11.0.0 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.wikiwand-wikipedia-modernized Wikipedia, beautifully redesigned. Timelines, top questions, fact-checking, and more. AI built in.
windscribe-3.4.14.1 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.windscribe Windscribe helps you circumvent censorship, block ads, beacons and trackers on websites you use every day.
xbrowsersync-1.5.2 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.xbrowsersync Browser syncing as it should be: secure, anonymous and free! Sync bookmarks across your browsers and devices, no sign up required.
xdebug-helper-for-firefox-1.0.10 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.xdebug-helper-for-firefox This extension is very useful for PHP developers that are using PHP tools with Xdebug support like PHPStorm, Eclipse with PDT, Netbeans and MacGDBp or any other Xdebug compatible profiling tool like KCacheGrind, WinCacheGrind or Webgrind.
xkit-rewritten-1.2.3 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.xkit-rewritten The enhancement suite for Tumblr's new web interface
yang-2.0.7 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.yang An open-source, lightweight extension that allows using DuckDuckGo-like bangs anywhere.
yank-2.1.1 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.yank Yank URL and title of current tab, format to a chosen markup language, and copy to clipboard
ycs-continued-1.8.7 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.ycs-continued Search comments, replies, chat replay, video transcript for the current video on YouTube by contents, authors, time.
yomitan-26.3.16.0 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.yomitan Powerful and versatile pop-up dictionary for language learning used by 100,000+ language learners.
youronlinechoices-0.1.2resigned1 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.youronlinechoices Helps preserve your choices for online behavioural advertising from companies participating in the European OBA Self-Regulatory Programme.
youtube-alternative-switch-2.1.1 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.youtube-alternative-switch Quickly switch videos between YouTube, Piped, Invidious and Chat Replay.
youtube-auto-hd-fps-1.14.3 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.youtube-auto-hd-fps Automatically set the videos' quality on YouTube according to their FPS!
youtube-cards-1.0.4 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.youtube-cards Remove YouTube end cards and end screen recommendation videowall.
youtube-enhancer-vc-1.32.0 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.youtube-enhancer-vc 🚀 Enhance your YouTube experience with this powerful browser extension. Features include customizable volume control, automatic quality settings, playback speed adjustments, volume boost, and more. Build from scratch with easy steps.
youtube-high-definition-118.0.9 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.youtube-high-definition YouTube High Definition is a powerful tool that automatically plays all YouTube videos in HD, changes video player size, offers auto-stop and mute, and much more.
youtube-no-translation-2.21.4 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.youtube-no-translation Keeps YouTube content in its original language (Titles, Audio Tracks, Descriptions...)
youtube-nonstop-0.9.2 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.youtube-nonstop Tired of getting that "Video paused. Continue watching?" confirmation dialog?
This extension autoclicks it, so you can listen to your favorite music uninterrupted.

Working on YouTube and YouTube Music!
youtube-recommended-videos-1.6.7 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.youtube-recommended-videos Hide YouTube related videos, comments, video suggestions wall, homepage recommendations, trending tab, and other distractions.
youtube-redux-3.10.0 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.youtube-redux Replicate old YouTube look and features within the modern layout!
youtube-screenshot-button-4.4.2 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.youtube-screenshot-button Take screenshots from YouTube Videos &amp; YouTube Shorts. The addon adds screenshot button &amp; also enables Shift+A shortcut.
youtube-shorts-block-1.5.3 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.youtube-shorts-block Play the Youtube shorts video as if it were a normal video.
and hide "shorts"tab and videos (optional).
youtube-subscription-groups-18.3.4 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.youtube-subscription-groups The best way to group your subscriptions
Using this simple extension you can create collections that seamlessly fit into YouTube's layout.
youtube-suite-search-fixer-9.0.5 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.youtube-suite-search-fixer Remove ALL distracting search results, redirect shorts back to legacy page and try little visual changes suited for low resolution screens.
ytcfilter-3.0.5 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.ytcfilter The most powerful and intuitive YouTube chat filter extension.
zen-internet-3.1.2 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.zen-internet Inject custom css to make the web beautiful in Zen Browser
zeroomega-3.4.5 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.zeroomega Manage and switch between multiple proxies quickly &amp; easily.
zhihu-blocker-1.1.0 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.zhihu-blocker 本插件能屏蔽知乎首页的所有推荐内容和热搜栏，但保留关注和搜索功能，有助于数字健康。
zhihu-undirect-1.1.2resigned1 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.zhihu-undirect 移除知乎外部链接重定向，加速上网、避免访问追踪。
zhongwen-5.16.0 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.zhongwen Official Firefox port of the Zhongwen Chrome extension (http://github.com/cschiller/zhongwen). Translate Chinese characters by hovering over them with the mouse. Includes internal word list, links to Chinese Grammar Wiki, tone colors, and more.
zoom-image-2.7.1 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.zoom-image As though the mouse wheel rotate by the right click on the images, you can do the images extenting / reducing / rotating and so on.
It can be expanded regardless of design. Also you can drag zoomed images.
zoom-page-we-19.13 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.zoom-page-we Zoom web pages (either per-site or per-tab) using full-page zoom, text-only zoom and minimum font size. Fit-to-width zooming can be applied to pages automatically. Fit-to-window scaling can be applied to small images.
zoom-redirector-1.0.2 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.zoom-redirector Zoom Redirector transparently redirects any meeting links to use Zoom's browser based web client.
zotero-connector-5.0.199 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.zotero-connector Save references to Zotero from your web browser
zybooks-auto-1.0 nur.repos.rycee.firefox-addons.zybooks-auto A firefox port of Zybooks Auto from the chrome web store.
Automatically speeds through ZyBooks participation assignments, so you don't have to click through each module individually.

mozilla-addons-to-nix-1.0.0 nur.repos.rycee.mozilla-addons-to-nix Tool generating a Nix package set of Firefox addons

eas-4-tbsync-4.17 nur.repos.rycee.thunderbird-addons.eas-4-tbsync Add sync support for Exchange ActiveSync (EAS v2.5 &amp; v14.0) accounts to TbSync
filtaquilla-6.1 nur.repos.rycee.thunderbird-addons.filtaquilla Adds many new mail filter actions - launch a file, suppress notification, remove star or tag, mark replied or unread, copy as "read", append text to subject.
filter-manager-1.3 nur.repos.rycee.thunderbird-addons.filter-manager Adds a Filters Button, opens Filter Manager
manually-sort-folders-2.3.0 nur.repos.rycee.thunderbird-addons.manually-sort-folders This extension allows you to manually sort (order) your folders in the folder pane of Thunderbird or automatically sort them, but in a better way. This extension also allows you to re-order accounts in the folder pane.
provider-for-google-calendar-128.5.11 nur.repos.rycee.thunderbird-addons.provider-for-google-calendar Provider for Google Calendar connects Thunderbird with Google Calendar for full task sync, conference details, and scheduling support. It offers deeper integration than Thunderbird’s native support using Google’s official API.
quickfilters-6.11 nur.repos.rycee.thunderbird-addons.quickfilters Quickly generate mail filters on the fly, by dragging and dropping mails and analyzing their attributes. Create a filter in less than 10 seconds, it's as easy as: drag, click, click.

By popular demand, supports SORTING filters alphabetically.

tbkeys-lite-2.4.3 nur.repos.rycee.thunderbird-addons.tbkeys-lite Custom Thunderbird keybindings

This add-on is a follow on to Keyconfig which is no longer supported.

It is aimed at power users. Please look at the GitHub site before leaving a one star review about documentation or usability.
tbsync-4.16 nur.repos.rycee.thunderbird-addons.tbsync TbSync is a central user interface to manage cloud accounts and synchronize their contact, task and calendar information with Thunderbird.

futu-opend nur.repos.shirok1.futu-opend OpenD is the gateway program of Futu API, running on your local computer or cloud server. It is responsible for transferring the protocol requests to Futu servers, and returning the processed data.
msd-lite nur.repos.shirok1.msd-lite Multi stream daemon - lightweight daemon for streaming media
osmo-fl2k-0.2.1 nur.repos.shirok1.osmo-fl2k Turns FL2000-based USB 3.0 to VGA adapters into low cost DACs
peerbanhelper-9.3.9 nur.repos.shirok1.peerbanhelper Automatically block unwanted, leeches and abnormal BT peers with support for customized and cloud rules.
qbittorrent-clientblocker-3.7 nur.repos.shirok1.qbittorrent-clientblocker 一款适用于 qBittorrent/Transmission (Beta)/BitComet (Beta, Partial) 的客户端屏蔽器, 默认屏蔽包括但不限于迅雷等客户端. A client blocker compatible with qBittorrent/Transmission (Beta)/BitComet (Beta, Partial) which is prohibited to include but not limited to clients such as Xunlei
snell-server-5.0.1 nur.repos.shirok1.snell-server Snell is a lean encrypted proxy protocol developed by Surge team
stata-19.5+2025-05-07 nur.repos.shirok1.stata Stata is a general-purpose statistical software package developed by StataCorp for data manipulation, visualization, statistics, and automated reporting.
sub-store nur.repos.shirok1.sub-store Sub-Store bundle (node) + front-end dist, with clean wrapper
sub-store-http-meta nur.repos.shirok1.sub-store-http-meta http-meta bundle (node) + tpl.yaml + mihomo from nixpkgs in META_FOLDER
example-package-1.0 nur.repos.shymega.example-package
awesome-4.3-unstable-2025-11-17 nur.repos.sigprof.awesome Highly configurable, dynamic window manager for X
cosevka-6.1.3.1 nur.repos.sigprof.cosevka Customized version of the Iosevka font - slender monospace sans-serif and
slab-serif typeface inspired by Pragmata Pro, M+ and PF DIN Mono,
designed to be the ideal font for programming.

virt-manager-5.1.0 nur.repos.sigprof.virt-manager Desktop user interface for managing virtual machines.
This package also includes virt-manager 2.2.1 as
"virt-manager-2"; that old version of virt-manager may be required to
connect to old hosts with obsolete libvirt versions.

This NUR package builds a fork that uses slint (for krokiet GUI) from git master
to work around upstream issue #1716 / #1720 on NixOS.

WARNING: This needs rustc >=1.92, nixpkgs 25.11 currently (2026-02-02) only has 1.91, so if you're on NixOS <= 25.11 you need to load rustPlatform from unstable.

00000-howto nur.repos.xddxdd._meta.howto This NUR has a binary cache. Use the following settings to access it:

nix.settings.substituters = [ "https://attic.xuyh0120.win/lantian" ];
nix.settings.trusted-public-keys = [ "lantian:EeAUQ+W+6r7EtwnmYjeVwx5kOGEBpjlBfPlzGlTNvHc=" ];

Or, use variables from this repository in case I change them:

nix.settings.substituters = [ nur.repos.xddxdd._meta.url ];
nix.settings.trusted-public-keys = [ nur.repos.xddxdd._meta.publicKey ];
